problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
